name: WW Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup rye flour (or another cup WW flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add 1 cup mashed banana or applesauce and enough rice milk to form a batter.
3. Carefully fry the mixture in a nonstick or Pam-sprayed pan until golden brown.
4. Season with cinnamon, nutmeg, or add half a cup of undercooked 7-grain cereal if desired.
